title: [Control Systems] Moxa security advisory (AV26-393)
description: On April 27, 2026, Moxa published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: TN-4900 Series  firmware version v3.22 and prior
EDR-8010 Series  firmware version v3.23 and prior
EDR-G9010 Series  firmware version v3.23.1 and prior
OnCell G4302-LTE4 Series - firmware version v3.23.0 and prior
OnCell G4308-LTE4 Series  firmware version v3.23.0 and prior
EDF-G1002-BP Series  firmware version v3.23 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
